---
title: "x8_genbank_json_export"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, jsonlite, here, taxize)

# import json file
json_12s = fromJSON(here("methods_analysis", "output", "12S", "UK0XTPC0016-Alignment.json"))
json_16s = fromJSON(here("methods_analysis", "output", "16S", "UPAWB0ED014-Alignment.json"))

# strip hit taxa
search_12s = json_12s$BlastOutput2$report$results$search
search_16s =  json_16s$BlastOutput2$report$results$search

# preallocate
all_hits_12s = tibble(asv_id = c())
all_hits_16s = tibble(asv_id = c())

# for each item
## 12s
for (ii in 1:length(search_12s$hits)) {
  print(ii)
  
  ii_hits = search_12s$hits[[ii]]$description %>%
    map_dfr(as_tibble, .id = "hit_id") %>%
    mutate(asv_id = search_12s$query_title[ii])
  
  ii_identity = search_12s$hits[[ii]]$hsps %>%
    map_dfr(as_tibble, .id = "hit_id")
  
  if (nrow(ii_hits) > 0) {
    ii_identity = ii_identity %>%
    mutate(p_identity = identity / align_len) %>%
    select(hit_id,
           p_identity)
    
    ii_out = ii_hits %>%
    left_join(ii_identity, by = "hit_id")
  } else {
    ii_out = tibble()
  }
  
  all_hits_12s = bind_rows(all_hits_12s, ii_out)
}

##16s
for (ii in 1:length(search_16s$hits)) {
  print(ii)
  
  ii_hits = search_16s$hits[[ii]]$description %>%
    map_dfr(as_tibble, .id = "hit_id") %>%
    mutate(asv_id = search_16s$query_title[ii])
  
  ii_identity = search_16s$hits[[ii]]$hsps %>%
    map_dfr(as_tibble, .id = "hit_id")
  
  if (nrow(ii_hits) > 0) {
    ii_identity = ii_identity %>%
    mutate(p_identity = identity / align_len) %>%
    select(hit_id,
           p_identity)
    
    ii_out = ii_hits %>%
    left_join(ii_identity, by = "hit_id")
  } else {
    ii_out = tibble()
  }
  
  all_hits_16s = bind_rows(all_hits_16s, ii_out)
}

all_hits = bind_rows(all_hits_12s,
                     all_hits_16s) %>%
  select(asv_id,
         everything())

# query genbank taxonomy

all_taxids = unique(all_hits$taxid)
ncbi_taxa = classification(all_taxids, db = "ncbi")

# extract taxa
all_taxa = tibble(taxid = c())

for (ii in 1:length(all_taxids)) {
  print(ii)
  ii_taxa = ncbi_taxa[[ii]] %>%
    select(-id) %>%
    filter(rank %in% c("domain",
                       "kingdom",
                       "phylum",
                       "class",
                       "order",
                       "family",
                       "genus",
                       "species")) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = rank,
                values_from = name) %>%
    mutate(taxid = all_taxids[ii])
  
  all_taxa = bind_rows(all_taxa, ii_taxa)
}

all_hits_out = all_hits %>%
  left_join(all_taxa, by = "taxid") %>%
  rename(b_domain = domain,
         b_kingdom = kingdom,
         b_phylum = phylum,
         b_class = class,
         b_order = order,
         b_family = family,
         b_genus = genus,
         b_species = species) %>%
  select(asv_id,
         hit_id,
         accession,
         taxid,
         p_identity,
         b_domain,
         b_kingdom,
         b_phylum,
         b_class,
         b_order,
         b_family,
         b_genus,
         b_species)

write_csv(all_hits_out, here("methods_analysis", "output", "genbank_alignment_12s_16s.csv"))

```
